title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 34.043 - Competitive bidding — waiver of permitted, when
text:
34.043.  Competitive bidding — waiver of permitted, when. — The commissioner of administration may waive competitive bids for the purchase of supplies for the purpose of resale to the general public in concession operations controlled by the state.
(L. 1990 S.B. 808 & 672 § 5)
